content: Add credits from your wallet to {{organizationName}} AI to start using features. AI expenses are handled through a sub-account, ensuring a spending limit and protecting your wallet balance.

comment.text: This text explains how to add credits from a wallet to fund AI usage within the platform. It appears in a dialog (TopUpAiModal) to guide users on how to pay for AI features, highlighting the use of a sub-account for spending limits and wallet protection. Translators should ensure the explanation of the sub-account function is clear.
